lost: raw_stacktrace → only extracted symbol (line info lost)
test_output → not passed through unless explicit
historical_fixes → BQ uses only recent, no cross-session
duplicated: confidence stored in BQ output + IC + EL + final_result
code_context in WM state + BQ grounding + IC target_file
ignored: cross_symbol_relations (BQ has but EL doesn't query)
wm.open_questions (EL checks but doesn't prioritize over routing)

bottlenecks.detail: First-encounter symbols score 0.0-0.5. Need faster grounding from few examples.
IC treats all missing tests equally. Should distinguish: no test needed (refactor) vs test critical (deploy).

bottlenecks.bottleneck: EL: CENTRAL_REVIEW over-triggers for medium confidence
bottlenecks.detail: Many bugs with 0.4-0.6 confidence get CENTRAL_REVIEW. Could be LOCAL_HANDLE with flag.
BQ learns per-session but patterns don't transfer. Need Sleep Replay (Gen 16).

bottlenecks.bottleneck: BQ: Diversity formula still favors multi-file contexts
bottlenecks.detail: Same-file bugs get lower diversity score. Should weight bug-type variety too.

bottlenecks.bottleneck: EL: No brain_output fusion before routing
bottlenecks.detail: EL routes based on single BQ output. Should fuse multiple brain opinions.

bottlenecks.bottleneck: IC: SENSITIVE_FILES list is static and incomplete
bottlenecks.detail: New sensitive patterns can't be added without code change.

bottlenecks.bottleneck: WM: No auto-save (data loss on crash)
bottlenecks.detail: Sessions live in memory. Crash = all context lost.
WM→BQ→IC→EL is sequential. Could run BQ+WM in parallel with IC.
No protection against rapid-fire malicious requests.
